queries.question: What subjects are common to all photographers?
queries.sql: SELECT Subjects.subject_name  from Photographers_Subjects join Subjects on Photographers_Subjects.subject_id = Subjects.id join Photographers on Photographers_Subjects.photographer_id = Photographers.id   GROUP BY Photographers_Subjects.subject_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photographers_Subjects.photographer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photographers)

queries.question: For each photographer, list the subjects they are studying.
queries.sql: select photographers.name , subjects.subject_name from Photographers_Subjects join Subjects on Photographers_Subjects.subject_id = Subjects.id join Photographers on Photographers_Subjects.photographer_id = Photographers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?subject_name WHERE {
  ?photographers_subjects a :Photographers_Subjects .
  ?subjects a :Subjects .
  ?photographers_subjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
  ?photographers a :Photographers .
  ?photographers_subjects p:hasPhotographers ?photographers .
  ?photographers p:name ?name .
  ?subjects p:subject_name ?subject_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the subjects every photographer studies.
